attributes.title: Proxmox VE Security & Threats
attributes.description: Proxmox VE hypervisor security. Overview & auth panels span ALL PVE activity (stock proxmox-ve auth rules 87201/87202/87203 + this pack's custom rules 100390-100423); detection panels are scoped to the custom rules: VM/CT lifecycle and DESTRUCTION (anti-recovery), pveum admin / API-token and /etc/pve/user.cfg rogue-admin changes, PVE web-UI/API brute force (canonical srcip -> MISP IOC + GeoIP), and /etc/pve cluster-config FIM (priv keys, corosync, firewall, storage). Several detection panels are forward-looking and populate when the event first occurs.
